title: 日本ダービーの後に・あなたの夢の次は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky loses the Japanese Derby, the second
race of the Classic Triple Crown, to Special
Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd roars with excitement. Special Week
will only grow more popular now that she's proven
how strong she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her strength leaves an impression on Seiun Sky,
and we continue on our path to the Kikuka Sho,
the final Classic Triple Crown race.
